projectOnboarding.pageDescription: Choose whether to begin with your own empty project or explore OpenFarmPlanner first with realistic sample data.
projectOnboarding.restartDescription: You can reopen the introduction at any time without changing your existing projects.
projectOnboarding.emptyDescription: Create your own project and add locations, crops, and planting plans step by step.
projectOnboarding.demoDescription: Start with a prepared growing project and explore the core features directly with realistic sample data.
projectOnboarding.demoCreatedHint: This project contains sample data. You can edit everything freely or delete the project at any time.
projectOnboarding.demoCreateError: Demo project could not be created. Please try again.

runtime.applicationUpdatedFallback: The application could not be updated automatically. Please try again later.
runtime.routeErrorFallback: The page could not be restored automatically. Please try again later.
